rss.title: Trump administration to buy back another energy company’s offshore wind leases for 4 more projects
rss.snippet: The Trump administration is buying back Invenergy's four offshore wind leases for $765 million, redirecting funds to fossil fuel projects.

rss.title: FERC takes historic action, orders US grid operators to ‘defend or revise’ large load interconnection tariffs
rss.snippet: FERC has issued tailored show-cause orders under section 206 of the Federal Power Act to each of the six regional grid operators within its jurisdiction, directing them to either justify or reform the rules governing how large energy users like data centers connect to the electric grid.

rss.title: New clean energy policy podcast launched by Factor This and Advanced Energy United
rss.snippet: Factor This is teaming up with the national multi-technology business association Advanced Energy United to launch a new podcast that explores the policy decisions impacting the energy transition.

arxiv_papers.title: Nodal Frequency Stability-Constrained UC & ED for Renewable-Dominated Power Systems
arxiv_papers.snippet: In modern power systems with high shares of renewable, inverter-based resources (IBRs), frequency stability becomes more complex due to the fast dynamics of IBRs and frequency trajectories that vary significantly from bus to bus.
